sound_sources.notes: Background wind, distant rumble and battlefield noise

sound_sources.label: Monster
sound_sources.notes: The large brown monster in scene 2

sound_events.description: Background wind howl, low rumble and continuous far-away warfare noise of a post-apocalyptic battlefield
Loud clangs, mechanical armor friction and sliding metal as the red robotic figures brace under heavy fire
Heavy mechanical stomps and metallic clanks of armored soldiers running frantically
Deep combustion burst of a plasma weapon firing at the target
Deafening combustion roar and mechanical thruster sound of a giant weapon firing a huge burst of flames
Short explosive blast of high-temperature flame thrower fire
Intense sustained fire-blast rumble and deep sci-fi energy weapon combustion
Loud explosive bang and metal shrapnel impact on armored soldier #2's torso
Violent blast impact on armored soldier #1's back armor
Sharp metallic detonation hit on soldier #2
High-pitch spark crackle and burning blast flare on soldier #1's armor
Short fire-flash ignition hit on armored soldier #1
Deep guttural growls, snarls and aggressive breathing of a massive beast moving forward
Tremendous heavy earth-shaking stomps, rock debris crumbling and rustling of a huge monster lunging and sliding downhill
Deafening, terrifying screeching roar of a massive monster with wide open jaws
